title: jacobaea racemosa subsp. racemosa
intro: Jacobaea racemosa subsp. racemosa, also known as the Jacobaea racemosa or Jacobaea, is a plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has been used to treat various health benefits including fever reduction, and it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Jacobaea racemosa subsp. racemosa include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
